TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Narowan == O ngangan no Narowan, i tiyaho i 1970 a mihecaan, paniyaro' ko kitakit to niyaro' no finawlan. O kalaradiway a finacadan ko 'Amis, orasaka ora narowan iya narowan hananay a radiw, todong han no 'Aims to ngangan to Narowan. O lekakaw no Pangcah i pipangangan i, milingangan to radiwan, mato ya ngangan no Narowan, na ititini i a dadiwan Narowan ira Narowan~~Narowan ira Narowan~, o matiniay pipangangaan i padotocay to ngangan sanay. o tatodong nonini midotocay to ngangan no to'as,, malo saka fana' no cowcow a tamdaw kiso sanay. O kasiikedan no niyaro' O Narowan a riyaro', o mamangay a niyaro'i ilaloma'ay no Ruysuy-syang (瑞穗鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen (花蓮縣 sowal no holam ) ko Narowan , itiniay i sa'amisan ira ko 瑞美, i satimolan ira ko 瑞穗 a niyaro'. ira ko cecay a patirengan a talo'an ilaloma', onini a talo'an o kasa'opoan no kasaselal, pilikakawaan to dademaken ato kalacecayan a mitayal no finawlan, oni ni a talo'an tatiih a awa itini i niyaro'. O lekakaw no Pangcah i pipangangan i, ira ko kalalecadan mingangan to nano to'as a rayray ko pangangan, malo saka fana' no cowacowa a tamdaw o niyaro no kako sanay. mato Narowan a niyaro', o dado'edo a radiw no loma' konini . O finacadan no Yincomi O Siwkolan a 'amis han ko Narowan a niyaro' , na itira i tarawadaw no Kalingko talatimol tangasa i Cilamitay, nawhani maemin paniyaro' i lawac no Siwkolan a tarawadaw sa mapangangan to Siwkolan a 'amis. i tiniay i Ruysuy-syang (瑞穗鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen (花蓮縣 sowal no holam ) ko Atolan a niyaro', Itiniay i sa'amisan ira ko Fata'an, i satimolan ira ko Posko. iraay to Kiwit a niyaro', Olaw a niyaro', Olalip niyaro', Kalala a niyaro', Sapat a niyaro', Atolan a niyaro', Langas a niyaro', Lacihakan a niyaro' , Ukang a niyaro' , Narowan a niyaro' , Morocan a niyaro' ato Koyo a niyaro, tosa ko safaw a niyaro' ko kasaniyaro'aro' i Ruysuy-syang. O pitooran no finawlan O pitooran ko finawlan no Atolan i, ora ma'araway a kiwkay i, ira ko tosa a kinkay i Narowan , o tingsikiw ato ciwlokiwkay, o ciwlokiwkay a tamdaw ko ka adihay. Mingodoay ko 'Amis a tamdaw to to'as a kawas, kalimelaan ko sowal no Kawas to sakafana' to 'orip no tamdaw, ato awaay to ko kaka to nikafana'to codad how i, itini i ira ko pitooran ngara, pakayni sa'opo no kinkay, malosakarikec sto sakarakat no 'orip no Yincumin. Narowan Itiniay i Ruisui Cen no Hualien ko Narowan a niyaro', 814 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,080 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 22% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 457 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 78% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,623 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 17%, 撒奇拉雅族1%, Truku 1%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u naro~uwan == o~u ŋaŋan no~u naro~uwan, i tijaħo~u i **** a miħəʦaan, panijaro~uʡ ko~u kitakit to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u finawɾan. o~u kaɾaraɬ~ɮiwaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u ʡamis, o~urasaka o~ura naro~uwan ija naro~uwan ħananaj a raɬ~ɮiw, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħan no~u ʡaims to~u ŋaŋan to~u naro~uwan. o~u ɾəkakaw no~u paŋʦaħ i pipaŋaŋan i, miɾiŋaŋan to~u raɬ~ɮiwan, mato~u ja ŋaŋan no~u naro~uwan, na ititini i a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiwan naro~uwan ira naro~uwan~~naro~uwan ira naro~uwan~, o~u matiniaj pipaŋaŋaan i paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u ŋaŋan sanaj. o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~unini miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u ŋaŋan no~u to~uʡas,, maɾo~u saka fanaʡ no~u ʦo~uwʦo~uw a tamɬ~ɮaw kiso~u sanaj. o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u naro~uwan a rijaro~uʡ, o~u mamaŋaj a nijaro~uʡi iɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u ro~u~ujso~u~uj-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) ko~u naro~uwan , itiniaj i saʡamisan ira ko~u **, i satimo~uɾan ira ko~u ** a nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a patirəŋan a taɾo~uʡan iɾaɾo~umaʡ, o~unini a taɾo~uʡan o~u kasaʡo~upo~uan no~u kasasəɾaɾ, piɾikakawaan to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ato~u kaɾaʦəʦajan a mitajaɾ no~u finawɾan, o~uni ni a taɾo~uʡan tatiiħ a awa itini i nijaro~uʡ. o~u ɾəkakaw no~u paŋʦaħ i pipaŋaŋan i, ira ko~u kaɾaɾəʦaɬ~ɮan miŋaŋan to~u nano~u to~uʡas a rajraj ko~u paŋaŋan, maɾo~u saka fanaʡ no~u ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u nijaro~u no~u kako~u sanaj. mato~u naro~uwan a nijaro~uʡ, o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u a raɬ~ɮiw no~u ɾo~umaʡ ko~unini . o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi o~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis ħan ko~u naro~uwan a nijaro~uʡ , na itira i tarawaɬ~ɮaw no~u kaɾiŋko~u taɾatimo~uɾ taŋasa i ʦiɾamitaj, nawħani maəmin panijaro~uʡ i ɾawaʦ no~u siwko~uɾan a tarawaɬ~ɮaw sa mapaŋaŋan to~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis. i tiniaj i ro~u~ujso~u~uj-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) ko~u ato~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, itiniaj i saʡamisan ira ko~u fataʡan, i satimo~uɾan ira ko~u po~usko~u. iraaj to~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ, o~uɾaw a nijaro~uʡ, o~uɾaɾip nijaro~uʡ, kaɾaɾa a nijaro~uʡ, sapat a nijaro~uʡ, ato~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, ɾaŋas a nijaro~uʡ, ɾaʦiħakan a nijaro~uʡ , o~u~ukaŋ a nijaro~uʡ , naro~uwan a nijaro~uʡ , mo~uro~uʦan a nijaro~uʡ ato~u ko~ujo~u a nijaro~u, to~usa ko~u safaw a nijaro~uʡ ko~u kasanijaro~uʡaro~uʡ i ro~u~ujso~u~uj-sjaŋ. o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan o~u pito~uo~uran ko~u finawɾan no~u ato~uɾan i, o~ura maʡarawaj a kiwkaj i, ira ko~u to~usa a kinkaj i naro~uwan , o~u tiŋsikiw ato~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj, o~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj. miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u to~uʡas a kawas, kaɾiməɾaan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas to~u sakafanaʡ to~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ato~u awaaj to~u ko~u kaka to~u nikafanaʡto~u ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ħo~uw i, itini i ira ko~u pito~uo~uran ŋara, pakajni saʡo~upo~u no~u kinkaj, maɾo~usakarikəʦ sto~u sakarakat no~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~u~umin. naro~uwan itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u naro~uwan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Narowan == O ngangan no Narowan, i tiyaho i 1970 a mihecaan, paniyaro' ko kitakit to niyaro' no finawlan. O kalaradiway a finacadan ko 'Amis, orasaka ora narowan iya narowan hananay a radiw, todong han no 'Aims to ngangan to Narowan. O lekakaw no Pangcah i pipangangan i, milingangan to radiwan, mato ya ngangan no Narowan, na ititini i a dadiwan Narowan ira Narowan~~Narowan ira Narowan~, o matiniay pipangangaan i padotocay to ngangan sanay. o tatodong nonini midotocay to ngangan no to'as,, malo saka fana' no cowcow a tamdaw kiso sanay. O kasiikedan no niyaro' O Narowan a riyaro', o mamangay a niyaro'i ilaloma'ay no Ruysuy-syang (瑞穗鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen (花蓮縣 sowal no holam ) ko Narowan , itiniay i sa'amisan ira ko 瑞美, i satimolan ira ko 瑞穗 a niyaro'. ira ko cecay a patirengan a talo'an ilaloma', onini a talo'an o kasa'opoan no kasaselal, pilikakawaan to dademaken ato kalacecayan a mitayal no finawlan, oni ni a talo'an tatiih a awa itini i niyaro'. O lekakaw no Pangcah i pipangangan i, ira ko kalalecadan mingangan to nano to'as a rayray ko pangangan, malo saka fana' no cowacowa a tamdaw o niyaro no kako sanay. mato Narowan a niyaro', o dado'edo a radiw no loma' konini . O finacadan no Yincomi O Siwkolan a 'amis han ko Narowan a niyaro' , na itira i tarawadaw no Kalingko talatimol tangasa i Cilamitay, nawhani maemin paniyaro' i lawac no Siwkolan a tarawadaw sa mapangangan to Siwkolan a 'amis. i tiniay i Ruysuy-syang (瑞穗鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen (花蓮縣 sowal no holam ) ko Atolan a niyaro', Itiniay i sa'amisan ira ko Fata'an, i satimolan ira ko Posko. iraay to Kiwit a niyaro', Olaw a niyaro', Olalip niyaro', Kalala a niyaro', Sapat a niyaro', Atolan a niyaro', Langas a niyaro', Lacihakan a niyaro' , Ukang a niyaro' , Narowan a niyaro' , Morocan a niyaro' ato Koyo a niyaro, tosa ko safaw a niyaro' ko kasaniyaro'aro' i Ruysuy-syang. O pitooran no finawlan O pitooran ko finawlan no Atolan i, ora ma'araway a kiwkay i, ira ko tosa a kinkay i Narowan , o tingsikiw ato ciwlokiwkay, o ciwlokiwkay a tamdaw ko ka adihay. Mingodoay ko 'Amis a tamdaw to to'as a kawas, kalimelaan ko sowal no Kawas to sakafana' to 'orip no tamdaw, ato awaay to ko kaka to nikafana'to codad how i, itini i ira ko pitooran ngara, pakayni sa'opo no kinkay, malosakarikec sto sakarakat no 'orip no Yincumin. Narowan Itiniay i Ruisui Cen no Hualien ko Narowan a niyaro', 814 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,080 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 22% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 457 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 78% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,623 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 17%, 撒奇拉雅族1%, Truku 1%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u naro~uwan == o~u ŋaŋan no~u naro~uwan, i tijaħo~u i **** a miħəʦaan, panijaro~uʡ ko~u kitakit to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u finawɾan. o~u kaɾaraɬ~ɮiwaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u ʡamis, o~urasaka o~ura naro~uwan ija naro~uwan ħananaj a raɬ~ɮiw, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħan no~u ʡaims to~u ŋaŋan to~u naro~uwan. o~u ɾəkakaw no~u paŋʦaħ i pipaŋaŋan i, miɾiŋaŋan to~u raɬ~ɮiwan, mato~u ja ŋaŋan no~u naro~uwan, na ititini i a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiwan naro~uwan ira naro~uwan~~naro~uwan ira naro~uwan~, o~u matiniaj pipaŋaŋaan i paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u ŋaŋan sanaj. o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~unini miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u ŋaŋan no~u to~uʡas,, maɾo~u saka fanaʡ no~u ʦo~uwʦo~uw a tamɬ~ɮaw kiso~u sanaj. o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u naro~uwan a rijaro~uʡ, o~u mamaŋaj a nijaro~uʡi iɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u ro~u~ujso~u~uj-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) ko~u naro~uwan , itiniaj i saʡamisan ira ko~u **, i satimo~uɾan ira ko~u ** a nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a patirəŋan a taɾo~uʡan iɾaɾo~umaʡ, o~unini a taɾo~uʡan o~u kasaʡo~upo~uan no~u kasasəɾaɾ, piɾikakawaan to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ato~u kaɾaʦəʦajan a mitajaɾ no~u finawɾan, o~uni ni a taɾo~uʡan tatiiħ a awa itini i nijaro~uʡ. o~u ɾəkakaw no~u paŋʦaħ i pipaŋaŋan i, ira ko~u kaɾaɾəʦaɬ~ɮan miŋaŋan to~u nano~u to~uʡas a rajraj ko~u paŋaŋan, maɾo~u saka fanaʡ no~u ʦo~uwaʦo~uwa a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u nijaro~u no~u kako~u sanaj. mato~u naro~uwan a nijaro~uʡ, o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u a raɬ~ɮiw no~u ɾo~umaʡ ko~unini . o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi o~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis ħan ko~u naro~uwan a nijaro~uʡ , na itira i tarawaɬ~ɮaw no~u kaɾiŋko~u taɾatimo~uɾ taŋasa i ʦiɾamitaj, nawħani maəmin panijaro~uʡ i ɾawaʦ no~u siwko~uɾan a tarawaɬ~ɮaw sa mapaŋaŋan to~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis. i tiniaj i ro~u~ujso~u~uj-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) ko~u ato~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, itiniaj i saʡamisan ira ko~u fataʡan, i satimo~uɾan ira ko~u po~usko~u. iraaj to~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ, o~uɾaw a nijaro~uʡ, o~uɾaɾip nijaro~uʡ, kaɾaɾa a nijaro~uʡ, sapat a nijaro~uʡ, ato~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, ɾaŋas a nijaro~uʡ, ɾaʦiħakan a nijaro~uʡ , o~u~ukaŋ a nijaro~uʡ , naro~uwan a nijaro~uʡ , mo~uro~uʦan a nijaro~uʡ ato~u ko~ujo~u a nijaro~u, to~usa ko~u safaw a nijaro~uʡ ko~u kasanijaro~uʡaro~uʡ i ro~u~ujso~u~uj-sjaŋ. o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan o~u pito~uo~uran ko~u finawɾan no~u ato~uɾan i, o~ura maʡarawaj a kiwkaj i, ira ko~u to~usa a kinkaj i naro~uwan , o~u tiŋsikiw ato~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj, o~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj. miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u to~uʡas a kawas, kaɾiməɾaan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas to~u sakafanaʡ to~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ato~u awaaj to~u ko~u kaka to~u nikafanaʡto~u ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ħo~uw i, itini i ira ko~u pito~uo~uran ŋara, pakajni saʡo~upo~u no~u kinkaj, maɾo~usakarikəʦ sto~u sakarakat no~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~u~umin. naro~uwan itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u naro~uwan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
